panels.description: Medium shot: Miss Hunter, looking dishevelled and pale, sits in a Victorian study, leaning forward towards Mr. Holmes. Her expression is anxious and wide-eyed.

bubbles.text: I was foolish enough to go into the empty wing. It is so lonely and eerie... I was frightened and ran out again.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Mr. Holmes listening intently, his sharp eyes fixed on Miss Hunter, leaning back with his signature analytical look.

bubbles.text: It is to keep people out who have no business there. Do you see?

panels.description: Close-up: Mr. Holmes's face, narrow eyes, focused, showing intense intellectual curiosity as he processes the information.
Medium close-up: Miss Hunter reacting in sheer horror, hands covering her mouth, eyes wide as if seeing the mastiff approach.

bubbles.text: I'll throw you to the mastiff.

panels.description: Wide shot: A flashback transition, sepia-toned room, Miss Hunter lying on her bed, trembling in the dark, clutching her shawl, shadows of the house looming around her.

bubbles.text: I remember nothing until I found myself lying on my bed trembling all over.
